description.NEAR_LANDMARK_EN: Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road

2023-06-12T20:18:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Pui To Road (Castle Peak Road - Castle Peak Bay bound) between Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road and the slip road leading from Pui To Road to Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound) are closed to all traffic.   Traffic is busy now.

However, vehicles on Pui To Road cannot turn left onto Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound).   Traffic is busy now.
2023-06-12T20:33:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的杯渡路(往青山公路–青山灣段方向)介乎屯門鄉事會路與杯渡路通往屯門公路(往元朗方向)的支路之間的全線現已解封。  然而，沿杯渡路行駛的車輛不能左轉入屯門公路(往元朗方向)。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-06-12T21:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 由杯渡路通往屯門公路(往元朗方向)的交通現已恢復正常。
